lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: A sentence shares a complete idea. Sentences begin with capital letters and end with punctuation.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Sentence frame with capital and period highlighted.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Writing word lists instead of complete sentences.
lesson_snippet.real_world_connection: Notes, stories, messages, and school writing.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Sentences begin with capitals and end with punctuation.

worked_example.reflection_prompt: Did I use a capital and period?

hint_ladder.hint_1: Does it tell a complete idea?
